Please note our devices are specially imported, therefore the imported items may be Global or CN rom or CN rom flashed Global rom or CN rom with PLAYSTORE ONLY - PLAYSTORE PRE-INSTALLED It is the consumers responsibility to ensure they understand that they are purchasing an specially imported device. GLOBAL ROM - Global Version CN ROM - Chinese Version CN ROM flashed GLOBAL - Chinese Version FLASHED with Global ROM Software CN ROM with PLAYSTORE - Chinese Version with pre-installed Play store South African Clients - CN ROM devices are open to SA Network Providers Known application issues in the South African region: Android Auto, Google Wallet (Pay) and DSTV Newer CN Models are fully compatible with Google Services and no known application issues What is the difference between CN and Global ROM? 1. Language and Region Support Chinese ROM: Primarily designed for the Chinese market, it includes Chinese and English language . It also includes region-specific features and services. Global ROM: This version supports multiple languages, including English and other major languages. It is tailored for international markets. 2. Pre-installed Apps Chinese ROM: Often comes with a variety of Chinese apps and services, many of which are not available or functional outside of China.
